Title: Minimalist Celestial Landscape Wall Art - Moon and Mountains
Description:
Bring a sense of peaceful wonder into your space with this beautiful celestial wall art. Featuring a stylized crescent moon, constellation lines, and rolling, minimalist mountains, this design captures the quiet magic of a starry night.

The soft color palette—deep navy and dusty rose—is both calming and aesthetically pleasing, making it a perfect piece of decor for any room.

  • Minimalist Aesthetic: The clean, simple line work and composition fit perfectly into modern, bohemian, or farmhouse decor styles.
  • High Quality Print: Printed on durable, archival-quality material, this artwork provides lasting visual beauty.
  • Perfect Gift: Ideal for nursery decor, bedroom wall art, living room accents, or as a thoughtful housewarming gift for stargazing enthusiasts.

Add a touch of cosmic serenity to your walls and create a dreamy escape.
